purpose: Single authoritative context cache. Merges v3 provenance framework with live Termius SGR captures from 2026-03-31 session and canonical Dark Roast v2.0.0 artifacts. v4.1 adds Narwhal2/Mystic2 related themes.
differences_from_v41: Added Narwhal2/Mystic2 theme family (base + tuned) as related_themes — a separate category for app-level themes not captured in terminal SGR. Mystic2 is the Narwhal2 iPad Reddit reader theme.
Added 5-patch tuning sequence as a versioned design decision record, not just color values.
Cross-system mapping documented: Mystic2 tuned foreground (#D7C29A) is perceptually near-identical to Dark Roast workhorse (#D4C4A8).
differences_from_v3: Promoted live Termius SGR captures for Manhattan, Romania Night, Movember ANSI, and Octocat Dark ANSI — all four were marked unresolved/missing in v3 but were captured in the 2026-03-31 session.

Fixed Dark Roast foreground: #D4C4A8 (workhorse), not #E69A4C (accent). Restored full surface scale, crater brown layer, typography, OLED science, severity mapping, and app target integration from canonical artifacts.
Demoted novmbr as Movember ANSI fallback — live SGR blocks show materially different values (e.g., red #B5503A vs novmbr #97673D). novmbr retained as audit trail only.
Corrected Flexoki note: canonical docs map 600 (darker) to normal ANSI and 400 (lighter) to bright ANSI in dark mode, not the inverse.
Removed standalone Cyberpunk (non-Scarlet) — was not in the original request list.
All approximate SGR captures marked with confidence and +/- tolerance.
merge_policy: Canonical repo/design specs are preferred for open-source themes.
Live Termius SGR-derived colors are primary evidence for proprietary themes.
Where live extraction is approximate (eyeballed from screenshots), mark confidence and tolerance.
Public iTerm/candidate profiles are alternate tracks, never silently treated as exact.
Dark Roast canonical artifacts (JSON + Swift) are the single source of truth for the house theme.

evidence_tiers.canonical_artifact: Highest. Author-maintained design spec (Dark Roast JSON/Swift, Flexoki repo, Kanagawa repo).
evidence_tiers.canonical_repo_design_spec: Open-source theme repos with documented color mappings.
evidence_tiers.live_termius_sgr: SGR color blocks rendered by Termius with theme active. Approximate ±5-10 hex from screenshot eyeballing.
evidence_tiers.live_termius_sgr_exact: SGR blocks + Digital Color Meter verification. Not yet achieved for any proprietary theme.
evidence_tiers.hybrid_v4: Explicitly merged track with slot-level provenance.
evidence_tiers.public_iterm_profile: Published .itermcolors file. May differ from Termius rendering.
evidence_tiers.deprecated: Retained for audit trail. Do not use.

dark_roast.name: Enhanced Dark Roast: Black Label
dark_roast.decision: Single source of truth from enhanced-dark-roast-v2.json and EnhancedDarkRoastTheme.swift. Generate all platform targets from this spec.

design_philosophy.primary_system: Dark Roast — UI stimulation, hyper-efficiency, speed, precision
design_philosophy.accent_layer: Crater Brown — geological sedation, cognitive ease, marathon sessions
design_philosophy.fusion: Dark Roast dominance with Crater Brown sediment as textural accent. Kinetic Teal as cool-tone counterpoint for live data.
design_philosophy.oled_rationale: Deep saturated browns avoid purple-smearing artifacts. Pixel wake delays: #000000=18.5ms, #120C06=1.6ms, #160E08=1.8ms, #4D3B31=2.1ms.

display.use: Hero elements, brand identity, app titles

heading.use: Patient names, track titles, card headers

body.use: Clinical descriptions, UI labels, explanatory text

mono.use: Lab values, ISRC codes, JSON, timestamps, vitals. Ligatures.

surface_scale._note: 6-step. void=page bg, obsidian=content bg, dark_cacao=elevated, espresso=card bg, roasted_bean=borders, crater=geological accent.

crater_brown_layer._note: Geological accent tokens. Card bottom stripes, atmospheric radial bleeds, tertiary metadata (asparagus), grounded error states (rustic/rose).

foreground._note: display for hero text/brand chrome ONLY. workhorse for terminal, code, long reading. NEVER use amber #E69A4C as default foreground.

songExpanse.chrome_vs_content: AppTheme tokens = chrome/UI shell. TextColors (song-derived 9-tier from album art) = content areas. Never conflate.

movember.name: Movember
movember.confidence_note: ±5-10 hex per channel. Eyeballed from screenshot, not Digital Color Meter verified.
movember.decision: Full live SGR capture from 2026-03-31 session replaces the novmbr ANSI fallback. UI bg/fg confirmed across two screenshots.

tracks.name: v4_live_sgr_full
tracks.note: Full 16-color SGR capture from Termius iPad. Two screenshots taken — second was cleaner. Values are eyeballed approximations, not pixel-measured.

tracks.name: public_candidate_novmbr
tracks.note: Previously used as ANSI fallback in v3. Live SGR blocks show materially different values (red: #B5503A live vs #97673D novmbr, blue: #2D7088 live vs #457B7B novmbr). Demoted to audit trail.

movember.design_notes: Cyan slot remapped to copper #C08040. No cool tones except blue(4)/br-blue(12). Autumnal palette. novmbr has identical normal/bright — Termius live does NOT.

flexoki_dark.name: Flexoki Dark
flexoki_dark.decision: Use canonical Flexoki docs/ports. 600 accents = normal ANSI (darker), 400 accents = bright ANSI (lighter) in dark mode.

tracks.name: public_iterm_profile_variant
tracks.note: iTerm profile flips normal/bright intensity vs canonical design docs. Normal slots use 400 (lighter), bright use 600 (darker).

cyberpunk_scarlet.name: Cyberpunk Scarlet
cyberpunk_scarlet.decision: Termius UI chrome (scarlet fg, green cursor) from v2 profile + live SGR ANSI array. The scarlet fg is display-forward, not workhorse.

tracks.name: v4_hybrid
tracks.note: Default FG is scarlet red — stylized display theme. Contrast is low for body text. ANSI white #C7C7C7 is the effective workhorse FG.

tracks.name: live_termius_sgr
tracks.note: Preferred source for ANSI 0-15. FG shows as #C7C7C7 in SGR context.

tracks.name: v2_termius_ui
tracks.note: Preferred source for foreground, cursor, selection behavior.

monokai.name: Monokai Classic
monokai.decision: Termius-flavored UI chrome + canonical base16 ANSI array.

tracks.name: v2_termius_full
tracks.note: Termius maps blue slot to orange #FD971F, yellow to #E6DB74. Genuine variant, not a bug. Use for direct Termius import.

ayu_dark.name: Ayu Dark
ayu_dark.design_notes: Magenta slot (5/13) mapped to warm gold, not purple. Intentional — Ayu has no true purple.
ayu_dark.source: ayu-theme/ayu-colors, alacritty ayu_dark.toml, joshtynjala Windows Terminal port

manhattan.name: Manhattan
manhattan.confidence_note: ±8 hex per channel. Eyeballed from SGR screenshot.
manhattan.decision: Promoted from unresolved (v3) to live SGR capture. Captured 2026-03-31.
manhattan.design_notes: Near-monochrome. Blue/magenta/cyan all mapped to grays. Only red and yellow have real saturation. Concrete-and-steel NYC aesthetic.

octocat_dark.name: Octocat Dark
octocat_dark.confidence_note: ±8 hex per channel. Eyeballed from SGR screenshot.
octocat_dark.decision: Live SGR capture promoted over GitHub Dark Dimmed fallback. v3 correctly identified Dark Dimmed as the family; live capture confirms with minor differences.

tracks.name: public_candidate_github_dark_dimmed
tracks.note: Closest public family match. Retained as alternate.

tracks.name: superseded_v2_github_dark_default
tracks.note: Wrong family. bg #020409 is near-true-black, not the dark slate seen in Termius.

romania_night.name: Romania Night
romania_night.confidence_note: ±8 hex per channel. Eyeballed from SGR screenshot.
romania_night.decision: Promoted from unresolved (v3) to live SGR capture. Captured 2026-03-31.
romania_night.design_notes: Cool slate bg with warm earth accents. Blue-yellow-red tricolor influence. Cyan remapped to rust. Bright black is teal — unusual.

winter_night.name: Winter Night
winter_night.decision: Live SGR ANSI confirmed Nord family. UI chrome filled from Nord profile. Nocturnal Winter (v2) was wrong — deprecated.

tracks.name: superseded_v2_nocturnal_winter
tracks.note: Wrong theme entirely. Neon palette on indigo-black. Not what Termius renders as Winter Night.

winter_night.design_notes: Effectively Nord with minor red shift (#BF6168 vs Nord #BF616A — 2 units). Normal/bright identical for most slots.
winter_night.source: Live SGR + Nord fallback from mbadolato/iTerm2-Color-Schemes

related_themes._description: App-level themes from Amo's other projects. Not terminal themes — these use different token models (no ANSI, app-specific semantic roles) but share design DNA with the collection and are useful for cross-system harmonization.

mystic2_base.name: Mystic2 (Base)

token_model.note: Narwhal2 uses app-specific token roles (primaryText, visitedPost, markdownLink, commentAccent1-5) rather than ANSI. Not directly exportable to terminal formats.

surface_scale._note: Ordering is non-monotonic — settings_row (#161616) is between settings_bg and flair_bg, which may be unintentional.

thread_accents._note: Warm-soup of reds/browns — no monotonic luminance ladder. Thread depth visually ambiguous.

contrast_audit._note: Comment author and detail text FAIL WCAG AA. Body text passes AA but not AAA.

mystic2_base.design_notes: Shipped Narwhal2 theme. Red-heavy hierarchy reads as alarm/error instead of as information hierarchy. Cool blue-violet background (249° hue) contrasts with warm foregrounds. Everything saturated, no recessive layer.

mystic2_tuned.name: Mystic2 (Tuned — 5 patches applied)

token_model.note: Same app semantic model as base. Values refined through 5-patch tuning sequence.

thread_accents._note: Monotonic luminance ladder: gray → dark brown → black. Clear depth signal without hue soup.

contrast_audit._note: Body text passes AAA. Comment author and accent pass AA. Detail text at 3.0 is intentionally 'legible but ignorable'.

hierarchy_system._description: Four-layer perceptual hierarchy with explicit contrast targets per layer. More opinionated than Dark Roast's foreground tiers.

IGNORE.role: Metadata — legible but ignorable. Eye skips unless intent.

tuning_sequence.label: Demote Detail Text
tuning_sequence.rationale: Red metadata replaced with recessive gray. Stops every post from looking like a warning.

tuning_sequence.label: Dim Bottom-Left Metadata
tuning_sequence.rationale: Subreddit/time/author line drops to background-aware gray. Legible but ignorable.

tuning_sequence.label: Decouple Accent + Author
tuning_sequence.rationale: Authors anchored at #B26540 (bronze). Accent lifts to #C07A4A so interactive elements evolve independently of identity.

tuning_sequence.label: Structural Thread Accents
tuning_sequence.rationale: Comment depth bars use a luminance ladder (gray → dark brown) instead of decorative hue soup.

tuning_sequence.label: Boost Primary Text to #D7C29A
tuning_sequence.rationale: Real bottleneck. Lifts body text luminance for dense reading without breaking warm identity.

mystic2_tuned.design_notes: Refined reader theme. Fixes all WCAG failures in base, establishes monotonic thread depth, separates identity from interaction. Foreground #D7C29A is perceptually near-identical to Dark Roast workhorse #D4C4A8 (ΔE 6.8) — eye has calibrated to the same body-text target across both systems.

cross_system_mapping._description: How Mystic2 tuned and Dark Roast relate. They share foreground DNA but diverge on substrate and accent intensity.

body_text.verdict: Near-identical warm cream at ~74% L, 33-39° hue. Eye calibrates to same target across both.

background_temperature.verdict: Both sub-3% lightness (near-black) but opposite hue families. This cascades to all elevated surfaces.

primary_accent.verdict: Dark Roast uses full-intensity amber as primary CTA. Mystic2 uses muted bronze — appropriate for reader-app context where screaming accents are hostile to long sessions.

role_alignment_opportunities.observation: Mystic2's markdown link #F88943 (93% saturation, 62% L) is more saturated than Dark Roast's primary accent.
role_alignment_opportunities.suggestion: In Dark Roast vocabulary this slots closest to accent_hot (#D2691E). Consider adding a Dark Roast link_hot token at Mystic2's intensity, OR stepping Mystic2 links down to match Dark Roast's accent.

role_alignment_opportunities.observation: Mystic2 has no success/warning/error/live-data semantic tokens.
role_alignment_opportunities.suggestion: If unifying design systems, add Dark Roast's action palette (success #4CC4B4, error #C75B39, warning #BFA162). Even reader apps need voting feedback, gilded highlights, and error states.

role_alignment_opportunities.observation: Mystic2's surface scale is non-monotonic — settings_row #161616 is brighter than settings_bg #14121A but dimmer than flair_bg #18161F.
role_alignment_opportunities.suggestion: Either reorder to strict ascending lightness or document the intentional break. Dark Roast's 6-step scale (void → obsidian → dark_cacao → espresso → roasted_bean → crater) is strictly monotonic.

role_alignment_opportunities.observation: Mystic2 has explicit 'IGNORE' layer (detail_text at 3.0 contrast — legible but ignorable). Dark Roast's foreground tiers don't name this role.
role_alignment_opportunities.suggestion: Retrofit Dark Roast foreground tiers with contrast targets: display >= 12, workhorse >= 7 (AAA), secondary >= 3.0 (AA-large), tertiary 1.8-3.0 (ignorable). This makes the tier definitions perceptual, not just hex values.

dark_roast_could_learn_from_mystic2: Four-layer perceptual hierarchy (READ/ANCHOR/ACCENT/IGNORE) with explicit contrast targets per layer.
Explicit 'IGNORE' design primitive — a legible-but-recessive layer for metadata that the eye skips unless intent.
Patch-as-unit tuning model — numbered sequential steps with rationale and before/after contrast deltas, versioned as design decision records.
mystic2_could_learn_from_dark_roast: Explicit surface scale with semantic depth ordering and documented use per step.
Full semantic action palette (success/warning/error/live-data) beyond just primary_accent.
Cool-tone counterpoint (Kinetic Teal #4CC4B4) so live/active state visually breaks out from the warm field.
Typography token spec (Playfair/Instrument Sans/DM Sans/Fira Code) with documented usage per family.

shared_traits: Very dark substrates with strong warm-material or scarlet accents.
Readable neutral or near-neutral body text favored for workhorse use.
Unifying thread: dark substrate + warm materiality + selective red violence.

cyberpunk_scarlet.fg_note: scarlet display fg, ANSI white #C7C7C7 is effective workhorse

notes: Keep neutral body text from Flexoki/Movember. Scarlet as accent/prompt/error/trim only.
For OG Dark Roast DNA: carry crater-brown layering beneath near-black floor, amber sparingly.
Umber accent updated to live Movember value #B5503A (was #97673D from novmbr).

patterns.universal_gold_accent: All 11 themes have amber/gold in ANSI 3 or 11.
patterns.dark_roast_unique: Only theme with warm teal accent + warm brown 6-step surface scale + crater geological layer.

capture_queue.why: Live SGR captured but approximate. Digital Color Meter pass would tighten to exact.
Same — approximate SGR. Also missing cursor/selection from live.
ANSI solved (Nord match). UI chrome still inferred from Nord.

source_ledger.live_sgr_session: 2026-03-31 Termius iPad screenshots (Manhattan, Movember, Octocat Dark, Romania Night, Winter Night, Cyberpunk Scarlet)
source_ledger.ayu_ports: alacritty ayu_dark.toml, joshtynjala Windows Terminal gist
